verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Now I want to say Holy is Your name Let all creation proclaim Holy is Your name

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Now I praise You Lord of all creation You ordain the sun to rise and fall You scatter the stars across the heavens You come close enough to hear me call

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Your love is the shelter over my soul You fill me with the wonder of a child You will heal the humble and the broken Mercy flows like a river running wild

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: BRIDGE On the highest mountain I will lift my heart to the sky From the lowest valley Hear my cry
